user.title: StorageGuard Setup
user.description: StorageGuard will monitor your disk usage and help manage storage automatically.

abort.no_glances: Glances integration not found. Please configure Glances first.
abort.not_haos: StorageGuard requires Home Assistant OS or Supervised installation.

purge_database.name: Purge database
purge_database.description: Force recorder purge to reduce database size.

keep_days.name: Keep days
keep_days.description: Number of days to retain. Uses configured value if omitted.

clean_backups.name: Clean backups
clean_backups.description: Remove oldest backups beyond the configured retention count.

keep_count.name: Keep count
keep_count.description: Number of backups to retain. Uses configured value if omitted.

exclude_entity.name: Exclude entity
exclude_entity.description: Exclude an entity from the recorder.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Entity ID to exclude from recording.

include_entity.name: Include entity
include_entity.description: Re-include a previously excluded entity in the recorder.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Entity ID to include back in recording.

run_cleanup.name: Run cleanup
run_cleanup.description: Execute a full cleanup cycle respecting the current mode.

force.name: Force
force.description: Skip confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
